objective: Turn collected source snapshots into cited claims and event chronology without promoting inference to fact.
rules: Ensure one successful news.article-upsert for every pinned Source snapshot, even when matching Events or Claims already exist; copy the pinned source id, revision, locator and fetched time. A corrected retry after a failed call does not count as an additional snapshot.
List existing Events and Claims first and reuse their id and revision when they describe the same materialized fact.
Pin every factual claim to an exact source id and revision.
Keep reported, corroborated, contradicted, corrected and unverified states distinct.
Similarity proposes a duplicate; it never proves a merge.
